name: compass-mcp
description: Compass real-estate access for Claude — search listings, fetch property details, market reports, saved homes

tools.name: compass_search_properties
tools.description: Search Compass listings by location and optional filters

tools.name: compass_get_property
tools.description: Fetch a property's full details by Compass URL or property_id+listing_id

tools.name: compass_get_market_report
tools.description: Market report for a Compass region (median prices, days on market, YoY)

tools.name: compass_calculate_mortgage
tools.description: Local PITI mortgage-payment calculator — no network
